message:
fix: defer tab add to main loop to avoid data race

CDP thread was directly calling addTab() which modifies the tabs
ArrayList. Main thread reads from this ArrayList for tab switching
and rendering. When the ArrayList reallocates during append, it can
cause hangs or crashes due to the data race.

Fix: Add requestTabAdd() which stores pending tab info in a fixed-size
struct. Main loop processes this and calls addTab() from the main
thread, ensuring all ArrayList modifications happen on a single thread.
